author: Erik Hänel
changelog:
2025-10-30 v0.1.1
  c Resolved problems with importing and exporting of INI files
  c Resolved a problem with the XML tools
2025-03-28 v0.1.0
  c Changed code to work with v1.1.7.2504
  + Modernized some features to speed up calculation
2024-06-06 v0.0.9
  + Added $ini~serialize() to convert a config to a printable representation
  + Added $ini~deserialize() to undo the serialisation
  c Changed $ini~read() and $ini~write() correspondingly
  + Added a check in $ini~getGroup() to ensure that the group exists
2023-06-02 v0.0.8
  c $tools~findApp() was modified to improve the chance of finding the searched app
2023-02-16 v0.0.7
  + Added more tests to $xml~getTree()
  c Improved the behavior if selected root trees cannot be found
2023-02-16 v0.0.6
  + Added xml namespace with extraction functionalities
2022-12-30 v0.0.5
  + Added keywords
  + Added changeslog
description: This package provides tools for some selected filetypes to simplify the interaction with these kinds of files. Currently supported are INI files, LOG files and XML files (at least reading). Additionally, some generic file-oriented tools are available.
name: File tools
